name: Home Office Deluxe Storage Computer Desk White - Saracina Home: Transitional Style, Keyboard Tray, Wood Composite
description:
You'll wonder how you ever got work done without this Home Office Deluxe Wood Storage Computer Desk from Saracina Home. This three-drawer desk features, filing slots and a hanging file drawer. The configuration of this item makes it an excellent student desk. It looks nice in a home office, bedroom or any other room where you need a desk.

Product Dimensions:
Overall Height: 30"
Overall Width: 48
Overall Depth: 24"
